QW-210  PREPARATION OF THE WPS. (a) The WPS shall provide direction to the welder for making production welds. (b) The WPS shall list all essential variables as required by QW-250, except as provided by QW-280 for special processes. When applicable, supplementary essential variables shall also be listed. (c) Multiple WPSs may reference the same PQR, provided that the essential variable ranges are covered. See QW-200 for general WPS requirements. Filler metals shall comply with QW-404. Base metals shall be identified in accordance with QW-403. For thickness qualification limits, refer to QW-451.
